case_title: THE GERMAINE MARTY TRUST et al vs. CARNEY, KAREN, INDV. & DBA THE CHAMELEON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE GERMAINE MARTY TRUST COULY, JULIETTE, TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARNEY, KAREN, INDV. & DBA THE CHAMELEON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 853 VALENCIA ST, LEASE FORFEITED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GERMAINE MARTY TRUST COULY, JULIETTE, TRUSTEE SERVED MAY-11-1998, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CARNEY, KAREN, INDV. & DBA THE CHAMELEON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE GERMAINE MARTY TRUST COULY, JULIETTE, TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARNEY, KAREN, INDV. & DBA THE CHAMELEON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON JUNE 17, 1998 $3,825.35 RENT, $720.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $198.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,743.35, LEASE FORFEITED
